name: Lead Funnel
description: A Salesforce-style sales lead funnel managed as a kanban board. Leads move through fixed pipeline stages, carry CRM fields, activities, tags and a score.

modules.name: leads
modules.description: Lead card lifecycle: create, edit, move between stages, reorder, delete

operations.name: ADD_LEAD
operations.description: Add a new lead to the funnel in the NEW stage
operations.schema:
input AddLeadInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  company: String
  clientId: OID
  email: EmailAddress
  phone: String
  source: LeadSource
  priority: LeadPriority
  estimatedValue: Amount_Money
  owner: String
  score: Int
  tags: [String!]
  notes: String
  createdAt: DateTime!
}
operations.template: Add a new lead to the funnel in the NEW stage
operations.reducer:
if (state.leads.some((l) => l.id === action.input.id)) {
  throw new DuplicateLeadIdError(`Lead with id ${action.input.id} already exists`);
}
state.leads.push({
  id: action.input.id,
  name: action.input.name,
  company: action.input.company || null,
  email: action.input.email || null,
  phone: action.input.phone || null,
  source: action.input.source || "OTHER",
  stage: "NEW",
  priority: action.input.priority || "MEDIUM",
  estimatedValue: action.input.estimatedValue || null,
  owner: action.input.owner || null,
  score: action.input.score ?? 0,
  tags: action.input.tags || [],
  notes: action.input.notes || null,
  activities: [],
  createdAt: action.input.createdAt,
  updatedAt: action.input.createdAt,
});

errors.name: DuplicateLeadIdError
errors.description: A lead with the given id already exists in the funnel

operations.name: UPDATE_LEAD
operations.description: Update editable fields of a lead
operations.schema:
input UpdateLeadInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String
  company: String
  clientId: OID
  email: EmailAddress
  phone: String
  source: LeadSource
  priority: LeadPriority
  estimatedValue: Amount_Money
  owner: String
  score: Int
  notes: String
  updatedAt: DateTime!
}
operations.template: Update editable fields of a lead

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

operations.name: MOVE_LEAD
operations.description: Move a lead to a different pipeline stage (the core kanban drag)
operations.template: Move a lead to a different pipeline stage (the core kanban drag)

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

operations.name: REORDER_LEAD
operations.description: Reorder a lead within the board array
operations.template: Reorder a lead within the board array

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

operations.name: DELETE_LEAD
operations.description: Remove a lead from the funnel
operations.template: Remove a lead from the funnel

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

operations.name: ADD_ACTIVITY
operations.description: Log an activity (call/email/meeting/note) on a lead
operations.schema:
input AddActivityInput {
  leadId: OID!
  id: OID!
  type: ActivityType!
  note: String
  timestamp: DateTime!
}
operations.template: Log an activity (call/email/meeting/note) on a lead

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

errors.name: DuplicateActivityIdError
errors.description: An activity with the given id already exists on this lead

operations.name: DELETE_ACTIVITY
operations.description: Remove an activity from a lead
operations.template: Remove an activity from a lead

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

errors.name: ActivityNotFoundError
errors.description: No activity with the given id exists on this lead

operations.name: ADD_TAG
operations.description: Attach a tag to a lead
operations.template: Attach a tag to a lead

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError
errors.description: No lead with the given id exists in the funnel

errors.name: DuplicateTagError
errors.description: The tag already exists on this lead

operations.name: REMOVE_TAG
operations.description: Remove a tag from a lead
operations.template: Remove a tag from a lead

errors.name: LeadNotFoundError

errors.name: TagNotFoundError
